title: Populating Monday Brief on Net-New Calendar Items

posts.author: shelbypedigo (Shelby Pedigo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our Team has a “Channel Calendar” where channel owners can plan their consumer-facing communications. It doubles as a request center.

We are requiring our channel owners to fill out a brief on their calendar items that require creative development. We have set this up using the Monday Document / Brief - but people cannot populate the brief as they are creating a new item. They have to go back into the calendar item to create the brief.

Would it be possible to get it where when someone is creating a new item in calendar view on a board, that they can also create their brief (monday document) at the same time?

It improves user experience immensely - would love this considered!
